subject: iPhone keyboard lagging or freezing in apps
description: Typing in Messages, Mail, or other apps shows noticeable delay between keypress and character appearing; sometimes keyboard dismisses itself mid-sentence.

ts_steps.title: Close background apps
ts_steps.action: Swipe up from bottom (or double-click Home) to open app switcher; swipe away all apps, then reopen the affected app and test typing.

ts_steps.title: Reset keyboard dictionary
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → Transfer or Reset iPhone → Reset → Reset Keyboard Dictionary; this clears learned words but does not affect other data.

ts_steps.title: Disable third-party keyboards
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → Keyboard → Keyboards — remove any third-party keyboard (e.g. Gboard, SwiftKey) temporarily to test with the default Apple keyboard.

internal_information: Third-party keyboards with full-access permissions can leak memory or conflict with iOS predictive engine. Low storage can also cause keyboard lag — check iPhone Storage first if device is nearly full.
